narrations.assessor: Adam reviews Motor — rear-end collision for Aisha
narrations.comms: Cara messages Aisha that the claim is APPROVED and shares the repairer + rental details — claim closed

extras.narration: Sam assigns an approved repairer and books a rental car.

beats.narration: Aisha is rear-ended at an intersection and calls Zava Insurance.
Aisha drives across the neighbourhood to the Zava Insurance Claims Office to lodge her claim.
Aisha walks into the Zava Insurance building and approaches reception.
Aisha lodges her Motor — rear-end collision claim at the Zava Insurance reception.
Iris captures the at-fault details and photos.
Iris routes the claim to the Claims Assessor.
Adam reviews the policy and coverage for the collision.
Adam clears coverage — proceed to repairer assignment.
Sam assigns an approved repairer and books a rental car.
Adam hands the claim to Settlement.
Seth authorises payment for the repairer directly.
Cara messages Aisha with the final decision — claim APPROVED — and shares the repairer details and rental car pickup.
